title: Hyundai completes USDT treasury settlement pilot between US and Mexico
message_html: Hyundai completes USDT treasury settlement pilot between US and Mexico ...
snippet: Hyundai completed a proof-of-concept using Tether's USDT to settle a cross-border treasury transfer between its US and Mexican subsidiaries, highlighting growing enterprise interest in stablecoin-based payments.

title: UK lays out tokenized finance roadmap with projected £33 billion annual boost
message_html: UK lays out tokenized finance roadmap with projected £33 billion annual boost ...
snippet: Industry leaders say payment infrastructure must evolve alongside tokenized assets to enable real-time settlement.
